test-method.name: testMobileResponsivenessBreakpointScaling
test-method.description: Scenario: Verify mobile responsiveness elements scale usable inside compressed display frames

exception.message: Mobile Responsiveness Error: Form elements vanished or compressed out of viewport boundaries! expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Mobile Responsiveness Error: Form elements vanished or compressed out of viewport boundaries! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at test-method.description: Scenario: Verify application stability during form data transmission execution routines

param.value: Please provide your email address in format: yourname@example.com

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //input[@id='mntl-search-form--open__search-input' or @placeholder='Find a recipe or ingredient'] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 152.0.5, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260706120035, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.37.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 3108, moz:profile: C:\Users\ACER\AppData\Local..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Session ID: e2e21ab4-6da2-42cd-99d7-0c26a1b62a28

test-method.name: verifySuggestions
test-method.description: RS_008: Verify suggestions appear while typing

exception.message: FAIL: Autocomplete suggestions did not drop down. expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: FAIL: Autocomplete suggestions did not drop down. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at tests.SearchTest.verifySuggestions(SearchTest.java:110) at
